I wanted to go over this client build information form with you. That way you had a general idea of what's on it and why we're asking for it. So the first three questions are all going to be about getting to know you. So we'll need your email address, name, and business name. After that, the next three questions all pertain to the ads that we're going to help you build out. So we'll need to know if you have a specific demographic, for example, if you're a ladies only facility, the address of your gym or a location where you'll be taking your sales consultations, and then the area of the city that you're in. From there, if there's anything else you need us to consider, please put it down here. After that, we're going to start asking questions about the challenge that you'll be running. We'll want to know if you're running a six-week challenge or a 42-day detox to start, as well as your availability for your sales consultations. So in order for us to put this all together, we will need you to make a few different accounts. The first account is going to be an acuity scheduling account, and that is where your sales availability will go. Your sales availability is going to be connected to your click funnel, so we'll need you to create a click funnels account as well. When you create this account, or if you already have one, we will need you to buy a domain from click funnels, that way we can go ahead and get that set up for you. So you'll need to check this box once you've done that. If you already have multiple domains and you have a click funnels account, please answer this question here and let us know which site you'd like us to use. The Facebook login is for us to create your ads. And then we also have a Zapier account that we'll ask for you to create, and that is so we can automate all of your contacts from click funnels and acuity and put them into a Google Sheet. In order to put them in that Google Sheet, though, we will need your Gmail login as well so that we can pull that up. So that is really all we need. The last thing that is extremely important is that if you have two factor authentication set up on your Gmail or your Facebook account, please turn it off. That way your tech can get into those accounts to help you out. Once you're done with that, you'll go ahead and check this box right here and click submit. And we'll see you on your welcome call. And we'll see you on your welcome call.
